consistency.name_format: Standard title case for spell name.

quality.completeness: All standard required fields are present.
quality.description_clarity: Description is clear, detailing area of effect, obscuration level, dispersal conditions, and scaling mechanics ('At Higher Levels').
quality.scaling_mechanics: Scaling is straightforward: +20 ft radius per slot level above 1st. This is mechanically sound and easy to track.

mechanics.primary_effect: Heavily obscured area (hinders visibility and targeting).
mechanics.dispersal_trigger: Wind of moderate or greater speed (>= 10 mph).
mechanics.scaling_impact: Increases AoE size linearly, maintaining the core effect.
mechanics.class_balance_check: Appropriate for primary arcane/nature casters (Wizard, Sorcerer, Druid, Ranger).

analysis.recommendations: None. Data is consistent, high quality, and mechanics are clearly defined.
